title: Bitcoin tipped for $66K top as trader flags 'suspicious' BTC price gains
summary: Bitcoin pushed for a $64,000 reclaim despite the US-Iran war making a partial comeback and Binance spot sellers keeping up pressure from earlier in the week.

title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
summary: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

title: Esper: Hezbollah is 'Spoiler' for US-Iran Deal

title: Oil Keeps Flowing Through Hormuz Despite Iran Saying It’s Shut
summary: Millions of barrels of oil continued to flow through the Strait of Hormuz this weekend even after Iran claimed to have closed the waterway again, as Washington and Tehran offer contrasting narratives over the status of the world’s most important shipping chokepoint.

title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
summary: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.

title: OpenRouter's Fusion Promises Claude Fable-Level AI for Cheap—Right as Fable 5 Goes Dark
summary: OpenRouter's compound-model API stacks budget AI models—and beat GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 outright in benchmark testing.

title: Notorious ‘jaredfromsubway’ MEV bot drained for roughly $7.5 million in counter-MEV honeypot
summary: An X account using the bot's name claimed a $15 million loss and offered a $1 million bounty, but evidence shows it is a likely impersonator.

title: Secret Network’s Axelar bridge drained for $4.67 million in infinite-mint exploit that went unnoticed for seven days
summary: Secret Network says about $770,000 of the stolen funds still sits in the attacker's Axelar wallet, and that Axelar declined its request to freeze it.
